TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Fayez_al-Sarraj, title = Fayez_al-Sarraj, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fayez_al-Sarraj} }

S.FORM: = Fayez al-Sarraj = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas jiyax ka Fayez al-Sarraj ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Libya ta sayang o kiya ka Fayez al-Sarraj, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 30 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan libja ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Fayez al-Sarraj = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas jiyax ka Fayez al-Sarraj ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Libya ta sayang o kiya ka Fayez al-Sarraj, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 30 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan libja ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ajə* al-saɾɾaɟ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
